abilities.shortEffect: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.
abilities.effect: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.

requiredCredits: PokéAPI contributors for the structured API data.
